title: Pull candidate planning through existing Steuerboard artifacts
goal: Use existing Steuerboard artifacts as candidate evidence and convert them into Bureau tasks only when provenance and acceptance criteria are explicit.

acceptance.assertion: Candidate tasks preserve source artifact path, hash, and generated-at evidence.
Existing tasks are detected so duplicate task cutting is avoided.
No candidate is promoted without explicit acceptance criteria and approval class.

metadata.operator_lab_run: not applicable — planning task definition only
